input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7182 [Automation] java run fails for org.json4s:json4s-jackson_2.13:3.7.0-M16; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Version 3.7.0-M16 changes org.json4s.Reader to require readEither in addition to read; generated or existing tests that create custom Reader instances must adapt, but this is a source compatibility fix rather than setup.
The artifact is Scala 2.13-based; tests should stay on the repository's Scala 2 scaffold and avoid introducing Scala 3-only syntax or dependencies.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: json4s-jackson_2.13 is an in-process Scala/Jackson JSON library; its runtime POM dependencies are already transitive from the target artifact, and normal usage exercises parsing, rendering, extraction, custom serializers, and Jackson ObjectMapper integration without external services, Docker, or environment/system properties.
